title: Free Online Creative Workshops All Week Long
excerpt: I’m teaching at Workshop Week 2021 where you can get access to over 35+ creative workshops from your favorite artists (including me) for FREE! Workshop Week is June 7-11, 2021, and it’s being hosted by Becca from The Happy Ever…
body:
I’m teaching at Workshop Week 2021 where you can get access to over 35+ creative workshops from your favorite artists (including me) for FREE! 

Workshop Week is June 7-11, 2021, and it’s being hosted by Becca from The Happy Ever Crafter. 

   

You’ll learn bullet journaling, mixed media, handlettering and more from some of the best creatives! Click here for the entire schedule of teachers and classes. 

Registration is FREE and is now open NOW so go ahead and click this link to save your seat!

Classes will be streaming from June 7-11 and you’ll have access to each of the classes for 24 hours!

Workshop Vault

Would you like lifetime access to all 35+ courses + EARLY BIRD access? (That’s right, you can start watching the classes NOW before anyone else!)

Get the Workshop Vault for a special price of $49 (until June 6th, then prices go up)!

INSTANT, LIFETIME access to each course is only about $1.32! So much value for a steal! 

With the Workshop Vault, you can watch the workshops at your own convenience for as many times as you’d like. And you don’t have to have to wait for June! 

   

Register here for the FREE Workshop Week and don’t forget to snag a Workshop Week Vault pass before the prices go up! 

Which classes are you looking forward to taking? Let me know in the comments!
